                                                          ifelse(summary(lm(egEMF_o_Biodiv ~ Multidiv, data=mf_data_lt[mf_data_lt$Climate == "fut", ]))$coefficients[2,4] <= 0.01, "**",
                                                                 ifelse(summary(lm(egEMF_o_Biodiv ~ Multidiv, data=mf_data_lt[mf_data_lt$Climate == "fut", ]))$coefficients[2,4] <= 0.05, "*", ""))),
                                                   sep=""), hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 4, color = "#60c3d9")+
  annotate("text", x = 0.73, y = 0.67, label = paste("R² = ",
                                                   round(summary(lm(egEMF_o_Biodiv ~ Multidiv, data=mf_data_lt))$r.squared,3), # pull out R² of linear regression
                                                   "\nP = ",
                                                   round(summary(lm(egEMF_o_Biodiv ~ Multidiv, data=mf_data_lt))$coefficients[2,4],3),# pull out p value of linear regression
                                                   " ",
                                                   ifelse(summary(lm(egEMF_o_Biodiv ~ Multidiv, data=mf_data_lt))$coefficients[2,4] <= 0.001, "***",
                                                          ifelse(summary(lm(egEMF_o_Biodiv ~ Multidiv, data=mf_data_lt))$coefficients[2,4] <= 0.01, "**",
                                                                 ifelse(summary(lm(egEMF_o_Biodiv ~ Multidiv, data=mf_data_lt))$coefficients[2,4] <= 0.05, "*", ""))),
                                                   sep=""), hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 4, color = "#111111")


ggsave("Figure_6_Biodiv_egEMF_o_Biodiv_Correlation.pdf", Figure_6_Biodiv_egEMF_o_Biodiv_Correlation, scale = 1, width = 6, height = 5, dpi=500, units="in")

Figure_6_Biodiv_egEMF_o_Biodiv_Correlation

Part 2: Economic approach

Calculating the insurance value of soil health and biodiversity:

A: Prove that soil health and multidiversity correlate with yield stability (given as the inverse of the yield coefficient of variation):

for (i in 1:50){
  mf_data_lt$Yield_Stability[i] <- (cv(mf_data_big$Yield[mf_data_big$Plot==mf_data_lt$Plot[i]])^(-1))
}

# linear regression across all climate and land use types

# For soil multidiversity:
Yield_Stability_M <- ggplot(aes_string(x="Multidiv", y="Yield_Stability", color="Climate"), data = mf_data_lt)+
  geom_point(aes(shape=LUT), size =2.5)+
  scale_colour_manual(values=c("amb" = "#007089", "fut" = "#60c3d9"))+
  geom_abline(slope = summary(lm(Yield_Stability ~ Multidiv, data=mf_data_lt))$coefficients[2,1],
              intercept=summary(lm(Yield_Stability ~ Multidiv, data=mf_data_lt))$coefficients[1,1])+
  ylab("Yield stability as\ncoefficient of variation")+
  xlab("Soil multidiversity\n(standardised according to taxons)")+
  ggtitle(paste("R² = ",
                round(summary(lm(Yield_Stability ~ Multidiv, data=mf_data_lt))$r.squared,3), # pull out R² of linear regression
                "\nP = ",
                round(summary(lm(Yield_Stability ~ Multidiv, data=mf_data_lt))$coefficients[2,4],3),# pull out p value of linear regression
                " ",
                ifelse(summary(lm(Yield_Stability ~ Multidiv, data=mf_data_lt))$coefficients[2,4]<0.001,"***",
                       ifelse(summary(lm(Yield_Stability ~ Multidiv, data=mf_data_lt))$coefficients[2,4]<0.01,"**",
                              ifelse(summary(lm(Yield_Stability ~ Multidiv, data=mf_data_lt))$coefficients[2,4]<0.05,"**", " "))),
                sep=""))+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size=12,hjust=1),
        axis.text=element_text(size = 5),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size=8),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=8))


# For soil health:
Yield_Stability_SH <- ggplot(aes_string(x="Soil_Health", y="Yield_Stability", color="Climate"), data = mf_data_lt)+
  geom_point(aes(shape=LUT), size =2.5)+
  scale_colour_manual(values=c("amb" = "#007089", "fut" = "#60c3d9"))+
  geom_abline(slope = summary(lm(Yield_Stability ~ Soil_Health, data=mf_data_lt))$coefficients[2,1],
              intercept=summary(lm(Yield_Stability ~ Soil_Health, data=mf_data_lt))$coefficients[1,1])+
  ylab("Yield stability as\ncoefficient of variation")+
  xlab("Soil Health\n(fraction of max)")+
  ggtitle(paste("R² = ",
                round(summary(lm(Yield_Stability ~ Soil_Health, data=mf_data_lt))$r.squared,3), # pull out R² of linear regression
                "\nP = ",
                round(summary(lm(Yield_Stability ~ Soil_Health, data=mf_data_lt))$coefficients[2,4],3),# pull out p value of linear regression
                " ",
                ifelse(summary(lm(Yield_Stability ~ Soil_Health, data=mf_data_lt))$coefficients[2,4]<0.001,"***",
                       ifelse(summary(lm(Yield_Stability ~ Soil_Health, data=mf_data_lt))$coefficients[2,4]<0.01,"**",
                              ifelse(summary(lm(Yield_Stability ~ Soil_Health, data=mf_data_lt))$coefficients[2,4]<0.05,"**", " "))),
                sep=""))+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size=12,hjust=1),
        axis.text=element_text(size = 5),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size=8),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=8))

Fig_Yield_Stability_M_SH <- ggarrange(Yield_Stability_M, Yield_Stability_SH, ncol = 2, nrow = 1, labels = "auto", font.label = list(size = 24), common.legend = TRUE, legend = "right")

ggsave("Fig_Yield_Stability_M_SH.pdf", Fig_Yield_Stability_M_SH, scale = 1, width = 9, height = 4, dpi=500, units="in")
Fig_Yield_Stability_M_SH

Get information about the correlation between yield stability and multidiversity / soil health:

print(paste("Yield stability (inverse of coefficient of variation) correlates with biodiversity (For all land use types: R² = ", 
            round(summary(lm(Yield_Stability ~ Multidiv, data=mf_data_lt))$r.squared,3),
            ", P = ",
            round(summary(lm(Yield_Stability ~ Multidiv, data=mf_data_lt))$coefficients[2,4],3), " (",
            ifelse(summary(lm(Yield_Stability ~ Multidiv, data=mf_data_lt))$coefficients[2,4]<0.001,"***",
                   ifelse(summary(lm(Yield_Stability ~ Multidiv, data=mf_data_lt))$coefficients[2,4]<0.01,"**",
                          ifelse(summary(lm(Yield_Stability ~ Multidiv, data=mf_data_lt))$coefficients[2,4]<0.05,"**", " "))), "); for grassland only: R² = ",
            round(summary(lm(Yield_Stability ~ Multidiv, data=mf_data_lt[mf_data_lt$LUT=="EM" | mf_data_lt$LUT=="EP" | mf_data_lt$LUT=="IM",]))$r.squared,3),
            ", P = ",
            round(summary(lm(Yield_Stability ~ Multidiv, data=mf_data_lt[mf_data_lt$LUT=="EM" | mf_data_lt$LUT=="EP" | mf_data_lt$LUT=="IM",]))$coefficients[2,4],3), " (",
            ifelse(summary(lm(Yield_Stability ~ Multidiv, data=mf_data_lt[mf_data_lt$LUT=="EM" | mf_data_lt$LUT=="EP" | mf_data_lt$LUT=="IM",]))$coefficients[2,4]<0.001,"***",
                   ifelse(summary(lm(Yield_Stability ~ Multidiv, data=mf_data_lt[mf_data_lt$LUT=="EM" | mf_data_lt$LUT=="EP" | mf_data_lt$LUT=="IM",]))$coefficients[2,4]<0.01,"**",
                          ifelse(summary(lm(Yield_Stability ~ Multidiv, data=mf_data_lt[mf_data_lt$LUT=="EM" | mf_data_lt$LUT=="EP" | mf_data_lt$LUT=="IM",]))$coefficients[2,4]<0.05,"**", " "))),")).", "); for farmland only: R² = ",
            round(summary(lm(Yield_Stability ~ Multidiv, data=mf_data_lt[mf_data_lt$LUT=="CF" | mf_data_lt$LUT=="OF",]))$r.squared,3),
            ", P = ",
            round(summary(lm(Yield_Stability ~ Multidiv, data=mf_data_lt[mf_data_lt$LUT=="CF" | mf_data_lt$LUT=="OF",]))$coefficients[2,4],3), " (",
            ifelse(summary(lm(Yield_Stability ~ Multidiv, data=mf_data_lt[mf_data_lt$LUT=="CF" | mf_data_lt$LUT=="OF",]))$coefficients[2,4]<0.001,"***",
                   ifelse(summary(lm(Yield_Stability ~ Multidiv, data=mf_data_lt[mf_data_lt$LUT=="CF" | mf_data_lt$LUT=="OF",]))$coefficients[2,4]<0.01,"**",
                          ifelse(summary(lm(Yield_Stability ~ Multidiv, data=mf_data_lt[mf_data_lt$LUT=="CF" | mf_data_lt$LUT=="OF",]))$coefficients[2,4]<0.05,"**", " "))),")).",
            " and with soil health (For all land use types: R² = ", 
            round(summary(lm(Yield_Stability ~ Soil_Health, data=mf_data_lt))$r.squared,3),
            ", P = ",
            round(summary(lm(Yield_Stability ~ Soil_Health, data=mf_data_lt))$coefficients[2,4],3), " (",
            ifelse(summary(lm(Yield_Stability ~ Soil_Health, data=mf_data_lt))$coefficients[2,4]<0.001,"***",
                   ifelse(summary(lm(Yield_Stability ~ Soil_Health, data=mf_data_lt))$coefficients[2,4]<0.01,"**",
                          ifelse(summary(lm(Yield_Stability ~ Soil_Health, data=mf_data_lt))$coefficients[2,4]<0.05,"**", " "))), "); for grassland only: R² = ",
            round(summary(lm(Yield_Stability ~ Soil_Health, data=mf_data_lt[mf_data_lt$LUT=="EM" | mf_data_lt$LUT=="EP" | mf_data_lt$LUT=="IM",]))$r.squared,3),
            ", P = ",
            round(summary(lm(Yield_Stability ~ Soil_Health, data=mf_data_lt[mf_data_lt$LUT=="EM" | mf_data_lt$LUT=="EP" | mf_data_lt$LUT=="IM",]))$coefficients[2,4],3), " (",
            ifelse(summary(lm(Yield_Stability ~ Soil_Health, data=mf_data_lt[mf_data_lt$LUT=="EM" | mf_data_lt$LUT=="EP" | mf_data_lt$LUT=="IM",]))$coefficients[2,4]<0.001,"***",
                   ifelse(summary(lm(Yield_Stability ~ Soil_Health, data=mf_data_lt[mf_data_lt$LUT=="EM" | mf_data_lt$LUT=="EP" | mf_data_lt$LUT=="IM",]))$coefficients[2,4]<0.01,"**",
                          ifelse(summary(lm(Yield_Stability ~ Soil_Health, data=mf_data_lt[mf_data_lt$LUT=="EM" | mf_data_lt$LUT=="EP" | mf_data_lt$LUT=="IM",]))$coefficients[2,4]<0.05,"**", " "))),")).", "); for farmland only: R² = ",
            round(summary(lm(Yield_Stability ~ Soil_Health, data=mf_data_lt[mf_data_lt$LUT=="CF" | mf_data_lt$LUT=="OF",]))$r.squared,3),
            ", P = ",
            round(summary(lm(Yield_Stability ~ Soil_Health, data=mf_data_lt[mf_data_lt$LUT=="CF" | mf_data_lt$LUT=="OF",]))$coefficients[2,4],3), " (",
            ifelse(summary(lm(Yield_Stability ~ Soil_Health, data=mf_data_lt[mf_data_lt$LUT=="CF" | mf_data_lt$LUT=="OF",]))$coefficients[2,4]<0.001,"***",
                   ifelse(summary(lm(Yield_Stability ~ Soil_Health, data=mf_data_lt[mf_data_lt$LUT=="CF" | mf_data_lt$LUT=="OF",]))$coefficients[2,4]<0.01,"**",
                          ifelse(summary(lm(Yield_Stability ~ Soil_Health, data=mf_data_lt[mf_data_lt$LUT=="CF" | mf_data_lt$LUT=="OF",]))$coefficients[2,4]<0.05,"**", " "))),")).",
            sep=""))
## [1] "Yield stability (inverse of coefficient of variation) correlates with biodiversity (For all land use types: R² = 0.304, P = 0 (***); for grassland only: R² = 0.077, P = 0.139 ( )).); for farmland only: R² = 0.033, P = 0.446 ( )). and with soil health (For all land use types: R² = 0.16, P = 0.004 (**); for grassland only: R² = 0.002, P = 0.797 ( )).); for farmland only: R² = 0.067, P = 0.27 ( ))."

B: Defining risk aversion:

r <- 0.28 # Relative risk aversion for a slightly risk averse farmer (Tevenart et al., 2021)

C: Calculating certainty equivalent CE and risk premium RP on plot level:

for (i in 1:50){
  mf_data_lt$CE[i] <- mf_data_lt$Yield[i] * (((1 + (cv(mf_data_big$Yield[mf_data_big$Plot==mf_data_lt$Plot[i]])))^2)^(-r/2))
  mf_data_lt$RP[i] <- mf_data_lt$Yield[i] - mf_data_lt$CE[i]
}

D: Investigate the effect of multicollinearity to make sure it is small enough to allow regression:

model <- lm(RP ~ Soil_Health + Multidiv + TOC + Yield + Nmin_Surplus, data=mf_data_lt)
vif(model)
##  Soil_Health     Multidiv          TOC        Yield Nmin_Surplus 
##     2.504887     3.487992     2.166896     3.775236     1.543861

E: Calculating response surface (risk premium as function of multidiversity and soil health):

x1 <- mf_data_lt$Soil_Health
x2 <- mf_data_lt$Multidiv
x3 <- mf_data_lt$RP

screening = lm(x3 ~ x1 + x2)
centcomp <- lm(x3 ~ x1 * x2 + I(x1^2) + I(x2^2))
centcomp_results = data.frame(x3, centcomp$fitted.values, x3 - centcomp$fitted.values)
colnames(centcomp_results) = c("expt RP", "pred RP", "residual error")

x1_axis <- seq(0.1,0.7,0.012) # based on min and max values of soil health
x2_axis <- seq(0.4,0.9,0.01) # based on min and max values of biodiversity

response = function(x,y){coef(centcomp)[1] + coef(centcomp)[2]*x + coef(centcomp)[3]*y + coef(centcomp)[4]*x^2 + coef(centcomp)[5]*y^2 + coef(centcomp)[6]*x*y}

z_axis = outer(X = x1_axis,Y = x2_axis, response)

pdf("Filename.pdf", width =12, height = 4.5) # width and height define the size of the pdf

contour2D(x = x1_axis,y = x2_axis, z = z_axis, xlab = "x1: Soil health", ylab = "x2: Multidiversity", clab = "Risk premium")

persp3D(x = x1_axis, y = x2_axis, z = z_axis, ticktype = "detailed", phi = 15, theta = 25, xlab = "Soil health", ylab = "Multidiversity", zlab = "Risk premium", clab = "Risk premium\n(€ / ha / yr)", contour = TRUE, cex.axis = 0.75, cex.lab = 0.75)

scatter3D(x = x1, y = x2, z = x3, add = TRUE, type = "h", pch = 19, col = "black", lwd = 2, colkey = FALSE)

dev.off() 
## png 
##   2
# From the variable 'response' which gives the formula of the multivariate polynominal regression, we obtain the insurance value of biodiversity IB and soil health IS:
for (j in 1:50){
  mf_data_lt$IB[j] <- (coef(centcomp)[1] + coef(centcomp)[2]*mf_data_lt$Soil_Health[j] + coef(centcomp)[3]*0 + coef(centcomp)[4]*mf_data_lt$Soil_Health[j]^2 + coef(centcomp)[5]*0^2 + coef(centcomp)[6]*mf_data_lt$Soil_Health[j]*0) - (coef(centcomp)[1] + coef(centcomp)[2]*mf_data_lt$Soil_Health[j] + coef(centcomp)[3]*mf_data_lt$Multidiv[j] + coef(centcomp)[4]*mf_data_lt$Soil_Health[j]^2 + coef(centcomp)[5]*mf_data_lt$Multidiv[j]^2 + coef(centcomp)[6]*mf_data_lt$Soil_Health[j]*mf_data_lt$Multidiv[j])
    mf_data_lt$IS[j] <- (coef(centcomp)[1] + coef(centcomp)[2]*0 + coef(centcomp)[3]*mf_data_lt$Multidiv[j] + coef(centcomp)[4]*0^2 + coef(centcomp)[5]*mf_data_lt$Multidiv[j]^2 + coef(centcomp)[6]*0*mf_data_lt$Multidiv[j]) - (coef(centcomp)[1] + coef(centcomp)[2]*mf_data_lt$Soil_Health[j] + coef(centcomp)[3]*mf_data_lt$Multidiv[j] + coef(centcomp)[4]*mf_data_lt$Soil_Health[j]^2 + coef(centcomp)[5]*mf_data_lt$Multidiv[j]^2 + coef(centcomp)[6]*mf_data_lt$Soil_Health[j]*mf_data_lt$Multidiv[j])
}

mf_data_lt$IB <- as.numeric(unlist(mf_data_lt$IB))
mf_data_lt$IS <- as.numeric(unlist(mf_data_lt$IS))

Monetisation (all units in euro / hectare / year) of the ecosystem services ‘Climate regulation’ and ‘Water regulation’ (Yield and biodiversity / soil health (insurance value) are already given in monetary units):

# Climate regulation: Monetisation based on yearly mean net carbon flux (relative to carbon content before the beginning of the experiment (1.9)):

soil_weight <- 1.35 # weight of soil in tonnes per m³
price_t_co2 <- 195 # social cost of CO2 emission in euro per tonne according to German Feder Environment Agency (2021)
price_t_co2_ETS <- 90 # average price of 1 ton of CO2eq emission within the European Emission Trading Scheme in 2022/23 (alternative price for sensitivity check)

price_t_co2_Kikstra <- 280 # average price of 1 ton of CO2eq emission according to Kikstra et al. (2021) (alternative price for sensitivity check)

depth_TOC_in_soil <- 0.3 # Assumed distribution depth of total organic carbon in the soil in m.

for (i in 1:50){
  mf_data_lt$TOC_Euro[i] <- mean(c((mf_data_big$TOC[mf_data_big$Plot==mf_data_lt$Plot[i] & mf_data_big$Year==Years[1]] - 1.9),
                                   (mf_data_big$TOC[mf_data_big$Plot==mf_data_lt$Plot[i] & mf_data_big$Year==Years[2]] - mf_data_big$TOC[mf_data_big$Plot==mf_data_lt$Plot[i] & mf_data_big$Year==Years[1]]),
                                   (mf_data_big$TOC[mf_data_big$Plot==mf_data_lt$Plot[i] & mf_data_big$Year==Years[3]] - mf_data_big$TOC[mf_data_big$Plot==mf_data_lt$Plot[i] & mf_data_big$Year==Years[2]]),
                                   (mf_data_big$TOC[mf_data_big$Plot==mf_data_lt$Plot[i] & mf_data_big$Year==Years[4]] - mf_data_big$TOC[mf_data_big$Plot==mf_data_lt$Plot[i] & mf_data_big$Year==Years[3]]),
                                   (mf_data_big$TOC[mf_data_big$Plot==mf_data_lt$Plot[i] & mf_data_big$Year==Years[5]] - mf_data_big$TOC[mf_data_big$Plot==mf_data_lt$Plot[i] & mf_data_big$Year==Years[4]]),
                                   (mf_data_big$TOC[mf_data_big$Plot==mf_data_lt$Plot[i] & mf_data_big$Year==Years[6]] - mf_data_big$TOC[mf_data_big$Plot==mf_data_lt$Plot[i] & mf_data_big$Year==Years[5]]))) * price_t_co2 * soil_weight * depth_TOC_in_soil * 0.01 * 10000 * 3.66 #(transformation factors: 0.01: percent; 10000: number of m² per hectare; mass transformation factor C to CO2 based on atomic masses of oxygen and carbon)
  mf_data_lt$TOC_Euro_ETS[i] <- mean(c((mf_data_big$TOC[mf_data_big$Plot==mf_data_lt$Plot[i] & mf_data_big$Year==Years[1]] - 1.9),
                                   (mf_data_big$TOC[mf_data_big$Plot==mf_data_lt$Plot[i] & mf_data_big$Year==Years[2]] - mf_data_big$TOC[mf_data_big$Plot==mf_data_lt$Plot[i] & mf_data_big$Year==Years[1]]),
                                   (mf_data_big$TOC[mf_data_big$Plot==mf_data_lt$Plot[i] & mf_data_big$Year==Years[3]] - mf_data_big$TOC[mf_data_big$Plot==mf_data_lt$Plot[i] & mf_data_big$Year==Years[2]]),
                                   (mf_data_big$TOC[mf_data_big$Plot==mf_data_lt$Plot[i] & mf_data_big$Year==Years[4]] - mf_data_big$TOC[mf_data_big$Plot==mf_data_lt$Plot[i] & mf_data_big$Year==Years[3]]),
                                   (mf_data_big$TOC[mf_data_big$Plot==mf_data_lt$Plot[i] & mf_data_big$Year==Years[5]] - mf_data_big$TOC[mf_data_big$Plot==mf_data_lt$Plot[i] & mf_data_big$Year==Years[4]]),
                                   (mf_data_big$TOC[mf_data_big$Plot==mf_data_lt$Plot[i] & mf_data_big$Year==Years[6]] - mf_data_big$TOC[mf_data_big$Plot==mf_data_lt$Plot[i] & mf_data_big$Year==Years[5]]))) * price_t_co2_ETS * soil_weight * depth_TOC_in_soil * 0.01 * 10000 * 3.66 #(transformation factors: 0.01: percent; 10000: number of m² per hectare; mass transformation factor C to CO2 based on atomic masses of oxygen and carbon)
  mf_data_lt$TOC_Euro_Kikstra[i] <- mean(c((mf_data_big$TOC[mf_data_big$Plot==mf_data_lt$Plot[i] & mf_data_big$Year==Years[1]] - 1.9),
                                   (mf_data_big$TOC[mf_data_big$Plot==mf_data_lt$Plot[i] & mf_data_big$Year==Years[2]] - mf_data_big$TOC[mf_data_big$Plot==mf_data_lt$Plot[i] & mf_data_big$Year==Years[1]]),
                                   (mf_data_big$TOC[mf_data_big$Plot==mf_data_lt$Plot[i] & mf_data_big$Year==Years[3]] - mf_data_big$TOC[mf_data_big$Plot==mf_data_lt$Plot[i] & mf_data_big$Year==Years[2]]),
                                   (mf_data_big$TOC[mf_data_big$Plot==mf_data_lt$Plot[i] & mf_data_big$Year==Years[4]] - mf_data_big$TOC[mf_data_big$Plot==mf_data_lt$Plot[i] & mf_data_big$Year==Years[3]]),
                                   (mf_data_big$TOC[mf_data_big$Plot==mf_data_lt$Plot[i] & mf_data_big$Year==Years[5]] - mf_data_big$TOC[mf_data_big$Plot==mf_data_lt$Plot[i] & mf_data_big$Year==Years[4]]),
                                   (mf_data_big$TOC[mf_data_big$Plot==mf_data_lt$Plot[i] & mf_data_big$Year==Years[6]] - mf_data_big$TOC[mf_data_big$Plot==mf_data_lt$Plot[i] & mf_data_big$Year==Years[5]]))) * price_t_co2_Kikstra * soil_weight * depth_TOC_in_soil * 0.01 * 10000 * 3.66 #(transformation factors: 0.01: percent; 10000: number of m² per hectare; mass transformation factor C to CO2 based on atomic masses of oxygen and carbon)
}

# Water regulation:
price_Nmin <- 7.3 # in euro per kg surplus (based on German Federal Environment Agency (2021) accounting price for nitrogen leaching into surface water bodies)
price_Nmin_groundwater <- 1.9 # in euro per kg surplus (based on German Federal Environment Agency (2021) accounting prices for nitrogen leaching into groundwater bodies, alternative price for sensitivity check)



for (i in 1:50){
  mf_data_lt$Nmin_Surplus_Euro[i] <- mf_data_lt$Nmin_Surplus[i] * (-10 * price_Nmin) # the factor "-10" is used to transform units from g/m² to kg/ha, minus sign added to to punish nitrogen surplus
  mf_data_lt$Nmin_Surplus_Euro_Groundwater[i] <- mf_data_lt$Nmin_Surplus[i] * (-10 * price_Nmin_groundwater) # the factor "-10" is used to transform units from g/m² to kg/ha, minus sign added to to punish nitrogen surplus
}

Now, enEMF of ecosystem service provision can be calculated on plot level, also, farmers economic value (enEMF_Farmers) is calculated; and enEMF under alternative price scenarios (Nmin leaching into groundwater instead of surface water; market price (based on EU-ETS) instead of social cost (based on German Federal Environment Agency Accounting Price) for carbon sequestration; anova is performed to check for significance of effects:

for (i in 1:50){
  mf_data_lt$enEMF[i] <- mf_data_lt$Yield[i] + mf_data_lt$TOC_Euro[i] + mf_data_lt$Nmin_Surplus_Euro[i] + mf_data_lt$IS[i] + mf_data_lt$IB[i]
  mf_data_lt$enEMF_Groundwater[i] <- mf_data_lt$Yield[i] + mf_data_lt$TOC_Euro[i] + mf_data_lt$Nmin_Surplus_Euro_Groundwater[i] + mf_data_lt$IS[i] + mf_data_lt$IB[i]
  mf_data_lt$enEMF_ETS[i] <- mf_data_lt$Yield[i] + mf_data_lt$TOC_Euro_ETS[i] + mf_data_lt$Nmin_Surplus_Euro[i] + mf_data_lt$IS[i] + mf_data_lt$IB[i]
  mf_data_lt$enEMF_Kikstra[i] <- mf_data_lt$Yield[i] + mf_data_lt$TOC_Euro_Kikstra[i] + mf_data_lt$Nmin_Surplus_Euro[i] + mf_data_lt$IS[i] + mf_data_lt$IB[i]
  mf_data_lt$enEMF_Farmers[i] <- mf_data_lt$Yield[i] + mf_data_lt$IS[i] + mf_data_lt$IB[i]
  mf_data_lt$enEMF_High_Yield_Cost[i] <- mf_data_lt$Yield[i] * 1.4 + mf_data_lt$TOC_Euro[i] + mf_data_lt$Nmin_Surplus_Euro[i] + mf_data_lt$IS[i] + mf_data_lt$IB[i] #alternative price scenario: 40% increase in crop prices
}


anova(lmer(enEMF ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))
## Type III Analysis of Variance Table with Satterthwaite's method
##               Sum Sq Mean Sq NumDF   DenDF F value    Pr(>F)    
## LUT         11271623 2817906     4 30.6383 14.9375 7.058e-07 ***
## Climate            2       2     1  8.2216  0.0000    0.9974    
## LUT:Climate   425643  106411     4 30.6383  0.5641    0.6905    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
anova(lmer(enEMF_Groundwater ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))
## Type III Analysis of Variance Table with Satterthwaite's method
##              Sum Sq Mean Sq NumDF   DenDF F value    Pr(>F)    
## LUT         4527832 1131958     4 30.7248  6.3848 0.0007333 ***
## Climate       14698   14698     1  8.2756  0.0829 0.7804767    
## LUT:Climate  438898  109724     4 30.7248  0.6189 0.6524074    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
anova(lmer(enEMF_ETS ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))
## Type III Analysis of Variance Table with Satterthwaite's method
##              Sum Sq Mean Sq NumDF   DenDF F value    Pr(>F)    
## LUT         8258090 2064523     4 30.6302 37.5886 2.099e-11 ***
## Climate       85011   85011     1  8.2053  1.5478    0.2478    
## LUT:Climate  119707   29927     4 30.6302  0.5449    0.7040    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
anova(lmer(enEMF_Kikstra ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))
## Type III Analysis of Variance Table with Satterthwaite's method
##               Sum Sq Mean Sq NumDF   DenDF F value    Pr(>F)    
## LUT         18229037 4557259     4 30.6439 12.3757 4.189e-06 ***
## Climate        55793   55793     1  8.2279  0.1515    0.7070    
## LUT:Climate   845217  211304     4 30.6439  0.5738    0.6837    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
anova(lmer(enEMF_Farmers ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))
## Type III Analysis of Variance Table with Satterthwaite's method
##              Sum Sq Mean Sq NumDF DenDF  F value    Pr(>F)    
## LUT         2266337  566584     4    32 153.0291 < 2.2e-16 ***
## Climate      127953  127953     1     8  34.5590 0.0003705 ***
## LUT:Climate    4876    1219     4    32   0.3292 0.8562379    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
anova(lmer(enEMF_High_Yield_Cost ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))
## Type III Analysis of Variance Table with Satterthwaite's method
##              Sum Sq Mean Sq NumDF   DenDF F value    Pr(>F)    
## LUT         9368336 2342084     4 30.6673 12.3478 4.261e-06 ***
## Climate        9940    9940     1  8.2309  0.0524    0.8245    
## LUT:Climate  466350  116588     4 30.6673  0.6147    0.6553    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
model_enEMF <- lmer(enEMF ~ LUT + Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt) # adapted model (+ instead of *) as there is no LUT:Climate interaction effect
model_enEMF_Groundwater <- lmer(enEMF_Groundwater ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt) # adapted model (+ instead of *) as there is no LUT:Climate interaction effect
model_enEMF_ETS <- lmer(enEMF_ETS ~ LUT + Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt) # adapted model (+ instead of *) as there is no LUT:Climate interaction effect
model_enEMF_Farmers <- lmer(enEMF_Farmers ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt) # adapted model (+ instead of *) as there is no LUT:Climate interaction effect
model_enEMF_Kikstra <- lmer(enEMF_Kikstra ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt) # adapted model (+ instead of *) as there is no LUT:Climate interaction effect
model_enEMF_High_Yield_Cost <- lmer(enEMF_High_Yield_Cost ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt) # adapted model (+ instead of *) as there is no LUT:Climate interaction effect

# Obtain the estimated marginal means (EMMs)
emm_enEMF <- lsmeans(model_enEMF, ~ LUT) # only for LUTS (Climate removed as there is no interaction effect)
emm_enEMF_Groundwater <- lsmeans(model_enEMF_Groundwater, ~ LUT) # only for LUTS (Climate removed as there is no interaction effect)
emm_enEMF_ETS <- lsmeans(model_enEMF_ETS, ~ LUT) # only for LUTS (Climate removed as there is no interaction effect)
emm_enEMF_Farmers <- lsmeans(model_enEMF_Farmers, ~ LUT) # only for LUTS (Climate removed as there is no interaction effect)
emm_enEMF_Kikstra <- lsmeans(model_enEMF_Kikstra, ~ LUT) # only for LUTS (Climate removed as there is no interaction effect)

emm_enEMF_High_Yield_Cost <- lsmeans(model_enEMF_High_Yield_Cost, ~ LUT) # only for LUTS (Climate removed as there is no interaction effect)

# Perform pairwise comparisons
pairwise_comp_enEMF <- pairs(emm_enEMF, adjust = "tukey")
pairwise_comp_enEMF_Groundwater <- pairs(emm_enEMF_Groundwater, adjust = "tukey")
pairwise_comp_ETS <- pairs(emm_enEMF_ETS, adjust = "tukey")
pairwise_comp_Farmers <- pairs(emm_enEMF_Farmers, adjust = "tukey")
pairwise_comp_Kikstra <- pairs(emm_enEMF_Kikstra, adjust = "tukey")
pairwise_comp_enEMF_High_Yield_Cost <- pairs(emm_enEMF_High_Yield_Cost, adjust = "tukey")

summary(pairwise_comp_enEMF)
##  contrast estimate  SE   df t.ratio p.value
##  EM - EP     -95.8 195 34.4 -0.491  0.9877 
##  EM - IM     862.7 195 34.4  4.417  0.0008 
##  EM - OF     263.6 189 34.0  1.393  0.6360 
##  EM - CF    1126.4 189 34.0  5.955  <.0001 
##  EP - IM     958.5 201 35.0  4.758  0.0003 
##  EP - OF     359.4 195 34.4  1.840  0.3681 
##  EP - CF    1222.2 195 34.4  6.257  <.0001 
##  IM - OF    -599.2 195 34.4 -3.067  0.0319 
##  IM - CF     263.7 195 34.4  1.350  0.6627 
##  OF - CF     862.8 189 34.0  4.561  0.0006 
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: Climate 
## Degrees-of-freedom method: kenward-roger 
## P value adjustment: tukey method for comparing a family of 5 estimates
summary(pairwise_comp_enEMF_Groundwater)
##  contrast estimate  SE   df t.ratio p.value
##  EM - EP    -295.4 195 30.5 -1.514  0.5615 
##  EM - IM      25.9 195 30.5  0.133  0.9999 
##  EM - OF     286.7 188 30.0  1.523  0.5564 
##  EM - CF     622.9 188 30.0  3.308  0.0192 
##  EP - IM     321.3 202 31.2  1.589  0.5149 
##  EP - OF     582.1 195 30.5  2.984  0.0411 
##  EP - CF     918.3 195 30.5  4.707  0.0005 
##  IM - OF     260.8 195 30.5  1.337  0.6710 
##  IM - CF     597.0 195 30.5  3.060  0.0344 
##  OF - CF     336.2 188 30.0  1.785  0.4004 
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: Climate 
## Degrees-of-freedom method: kenward-roger 
## P value adjustment: tukey method for comparing a family of 5 estimates
summary(pairwise_comp_ETS)
##  contrast estimate  SE   df t.ratio p.value
##  EM - EP        33 105 34.4   0.314 0.9978 
##  EM - IM       847 105 34.4   8.043 <.0001 
##  EM - OF      -216 102 34.0  -2.122 0.2346 
##  EM - CF       678 102 34.0   6.646 <.0001 
##  EP - IM       814 109 35.0   7.495 <.0001 
##  EP - OF      -249 105 34.4  -2.368 0.1486 
##  EP - CF       645 105 34.4   6.123 <.0001 
##  IM - OF     -1063 105 34.4 -10.098 <.0001 
##  IM - CF      -169 105 34.4  -1.607 0.5032 
##  OF - CF       894 102 34.0   8.767 <.0001 
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: Climate 
## Degrees-of-freedom method: kenward-roger 
## P value adjustment: tukey method for comparing a family of 5 estimates
summary(pairwise_comp_Farmers)
##  contrast estimate   SE df t.ratio p.value
##  EM - EP     -89.3 27.2 32  -3.280 0.0197 
##  EM - IM    -298.4 27.2 32 -10.967 <.0001 
##  EM - OF    -596.4 27.2 32 -21.915 <.0001 
##  EM - CF    -387.7 27.2 32 -14.246 <.0001 
##  EP - IM    -209.2 27.2 32  -7.687 <.0001 
##  EP - OF    -507.1 27.2 32 -18.635 <.0001 
##  EP - CF    -298.4 27.2 32 -10.966 <.0001 
##  IM - OF    -297.9 27.2 32 -10.948 <.0001 
##  IM - CF     -89.2 27.2 32  -3.279 0.0198 
##  OF - CF     208.7 27.2 32   7.669 <.0001 
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: Climate 
## Degrees-of-freedom method: kenward-roger 
## P value adjustment: tukey method for comparing a family of 5 estimates
summary(pairwise_comp_Kikstra)
##  contrast estimate  SE   df t.ratio p.value
##  EM - EP      -230 281 30.5 -0.818  0.9230 
##  EM - IM       880 281 30.5  3.131  0.0291 
##  EM - OF       652 271 30.0  2.403  0.1423 
##  EM - CF      1490 271 30.0  5.489  0.0001 
##  EP - IM      1111 292 31.1  3.809  0.0052 
##  EP - OF       882 281 30.5  3.137  0.0287 
##  EP - CF      1720 281 30.5  6.115  <.0001 
##  IM - OF      -228 281 30.5 -0.812  0.9248 
##  IM - CF       609 281 30.5  2.166  0.2196 
##  OF - CF       838 271 30.0  3.087  0.0326 
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: Climate 
## Degrees-of-freedom method: kenward-roger 
## P value adjustment: tukey method for comparing a family of 5 estimates
summary(emm_enEMF_High_Yield_Cost)
##  LUT lsmean  SE   df lower.CL upper.CL
##  EM    2308 149 35.2     2006     2610
##  EP    2464 158 36.1     2144     2785
##  IM    1576 158 36.1     1256     1896
##  OF    2352 149 35.2     2050     2654
##  CF    1389 149 35.2     1087     1691
## 
## Results are averaged over the levels of: Climate 
## Degrees-of-freedom method: kenward-roger 
## Confidence level used: 0.95
write.csv(summary(pairwise_comp_enEMF), "Table_S7_post_hoc_tukey_enEMF.csv")
write.csv(summary(pairwise_comp_Farmers), "Table_S8_post_hoc_tukey_enEMF_Farmers.csv")

write.csv(summary(pairwise_comp_enEMF_Groundwater), "post_hoc_tukey_enEMF_Groundwater.csv")
write.csv(summary(pairwise_comp_ETS), "post_hoc_tukey_enEMF_ETS.csv")
write.csv(summary(pairwise_comp_Kikstra), "post_hoc_tukey_enEMF_Kikstra.csv")
write.csv(summary(emm_enEMF_High_Yield_Cost), "post_hoc_tukey_enEMF_High_Yield_Cost.csv")

It was shown that the land use type treatment has a significant effect on enEMF (***) but not the climate treatment. Both grassland (p <= 0.01) and farmland (p <= 0.001) show a significant higher enEMF for the extensively managed land use types compared to the intensively managed land use types.

Fig_enEMF_treatments <- ggplot(aes(x=LUT, y=enEMF, color=Climate),data=mf_data_lt)+
  geom_point()+
  scale_colour_manual(values=c("amb" = "#D7551B", "fut" = "#F4B183"))+
  stat_summary(
    geom = "point",
    fun.y = "mean",
    size = 4,
    shape = 17)+
  #ylim(500,3500)+
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar")+ # add errorbar
  ylab("Economic ecosystem\nmultifunctionality (enEMF)\n(€ / ha / yr)")+
  xlab("Land Use Type")+
  ggtitle(paste(paste(ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[3] <= 0.05, "LUT:Climate", ""),
                      ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[3] <= 0.001, "***",
                             ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[3] <= 0.01, "**",
                                    ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[3] <= 0.05, "*", "")))),
                paste(ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[1] <= 0.05, "LUT", ""),
                      ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[1] <= 0.001, "***",
                             ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[1] <= 0.01, "**",
                                    ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[1] <= 0.05, "*", ""))),
                      sep=" "),paste(ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[2] <= 0.05, "Climate", ""),
                                     ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[2] <= 0.001, "***",
                                            ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[2] <= 0.01, "**",
                                                   ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[2] <= 0.05, "*", "")))), sep="\n"))+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=16),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size=16))

#ggsave("Fig_enEMF_treatments.pdf", Fig_enEMF_treatments, scale = 1, width = 5, height = 4, dpi=500, units="in")
Fig_enEMF_treatments

Fig_enEMF_Groundwater_treatments <- ggplot(aes(x=LUT, y=enEMF_Groundwater, color=Climate),data=mf_data_lt)+
  geom_point()+
  scale_colour_manual(values=c("amb" = "#D7551B", "fut" = "#F4B183"))+
  stat_summary(
    geom = "point",
    fun.y = "mean",
    size = 4,
    shape = 17)+
  #ylim(500,3500)+
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar")+ # add errorbar
  ylab("enEMF (alternativ price\nscnario: N leaching into\ngroundwater) (€ / ha / yr)")+
  xlab("Land Use Type")+
  ggtitle(paste(paste(ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Groundwater ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[3] <= 0.05, "LUT:Climate", ""),
                      ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Groundwater ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[3] <= 0.001, "***",
                             ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Groundwater ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[3] <= 0.01, "**",
                                    ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Groundwater ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[3] <= 0.05, "*", "")))),
                paste(ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Groundwater ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[1] <= 0.05, "LUT", ""),
                      ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Groundwater ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[1] <= 0.001, "***",
                             ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Groundwater ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[1] <= 0.01, "**",
                                    ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Groundwater ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[1] <= 0.05, "*", ""))),
                      sep=" "),paste(ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Groundwater ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[2] <= 0.05, "Climate", ""),
                                     ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Groundwater ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[2] <= 0.001, "***",
                                            ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Groundwater ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[2] <= 0.01, "**",
                                                   ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Groundwater ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[2] <= 0.05, "*", "")))), sep="\n"))+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=16),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size=16))

#ggsave("Fig_enEMF_Groundwater_treatments.pdf", Fig_enEMF_Groundwater_treatments, scale = 1, width = 5, height = 4, dpi=500, units="in")
Fig_enEMF_Groundwater_treatments

Fig_enEMF_ETS_treatments <- ggplot(aes(x=LUT, y=enEMF_ETS, color=Climate),data=mf_data_lt)+
  geom_point()+
  scale_colour_manual(values=c("amb" = "#D7551B", "fut" = "#F4B183"))+
  stat_summary(
    geom = "point",
    fun.y = "mean",
    size = 4,
    shape = 17)+
  #ylim(500,3500)+
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar")+ # add errorbar
  ylab("enEMF (alternative price\nscenario: EU CO2 market\nprice) (€ / ha / yr)")+
  xlab("Land Use Type")+
  ggtitle(paste(paste(ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_ETS ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[3] <= 0.05, "LUT:Climate", ""),
                      ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_ETS ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[3] <= 0.001, "***",
                             ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_ETS ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[3] <= 0.01, "**",
                                    ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_ETS ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[3] <= 0.05, "*", "")))),
                paste(ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_ETS ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[1] <= 0.05, "LUT", ""),
                      ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_ETS ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[1] <= 0.001, "***",
                             ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_ETS ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[1] <= 0.01, "**",
                                    ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_ETS ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[1] <= 0.05, "*", ""))),
                      sep=" "),paste(ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_ETS ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[2] <= 0.05, "Climate", ""),
                                     ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_ETS ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[2] <= 0.001, "***",
                                            ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_ETS ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[2] <= 0.01, "**",
                                                   ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_ETS ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[2] <= 0.05, "*", "")))), sep="\n"))+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=16),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size=16))

#ggsave("Fig_enEMF_ETS_treatments.pdf", Fig_enEMF_ETS_treatments, scale = 1, width = 5, height = 4, dpi=500, units="in")
Fig_enEMF_ETS_treatments

Fig_enEMF_Kikstra_treatments <- ggplot(aes(x=LUT, y=enEMF_Kikstra, color=Climate),data=mf_data_lt)+
  geom_point()+
  scale_colour_manual(values=c("amb" = "#D7551B", "fut" = "#F4B183"))+
  stat_summary(
    geom = "point",
    fun.y = "mean",
    size = 4,
    shape = 17)+
  #ylim(500,3500)+
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar")+ # add errorbar
  ylab("enEMF (alternativ price\nscnario: emission cost of\n280 €/tCO2eq) (€ / ha / yr)")+
  xlab("Land Use Type")+
  ggtitle(paste(paste(ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Kikstra ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[3] <= 0.05, "LUT:Climate", ""),
                      ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Kikstra ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[3] <= 0.001, "***",
                             ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Kikstra ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[3] <= 0.01, "**",
                                    ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Kikstra ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[3] <= 0.05, "*", "")))),
                paste(ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Kikstra ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[1] <= 0.05, "LUT", ""),
                      ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Kikstra ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[1] <= 0.001, "***",
                             ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Kikstra ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[1] <= 0.01, "**",
                                    ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Kikstra ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[1] <= 0.05, "*", ""))),
                      sep=" "),paste(ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Kikstra ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[2] <= 0.05, "Climate", ""),
                                     ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Kikstra ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[2] <= 0.001, "***",
                                            ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Kikstra ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[2] <= 0.01, "**",
                                                   ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Kikstra ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[2] <= 0.05, "*", "")))), sep="\n"))+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=16),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size=16))

#ggsave("Fig_enEMF_Kikstra_treatments.pdf", Fig_enEMF_Kikstra_treatments, scale = 1, width = 5, height = 4, dpi=500, units="in")
Fig_enEMF_Kikstra_treatments

Fig_enEMF_High_Yield_Cost_treatments <- ggplot(aes(x=LUT, y=enEMF_High_Yield_Cost, color=Climate),data=mf_data_lt)+
  geom_point()+
  scale_colour_manual(values=c("amb" = "#D7551B", "fut" = "#F4B183"))+
  stat_summary(
    geom = "point",
    fun.y = "mean",
    size = 4,
    shape = 17)+
  #ylim(500,3500)+
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar")+ # add errorbar
  ylab("enEMF (alternative price\nscenario: 40% increase of\ncrop prices) (€ / ha / yr)")+
  xlab("Land Use Type")+
  ggtitle(paste(paste(ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_High_Yield_Cost ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[3] <= 0.05, "LUT:Climate", ""),
                      ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_High_Yield_Cost ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[3] <= 0.001, "***",
                             ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_High_Yield_Cost ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[3] <= 0.01, "**",
                                    ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_High_Yield_Cost ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[3] <= 0.05, "*", "")))),
                paste(ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_High_Yield_Cost ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[1] <= 0.05, "LUT", ""),
                      ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_High_Yield_Cost ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[1] <= 0.001, "***",
                             ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_High_Yield_Cost ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[1] <= 0.01, "**",
                                    ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_High_Yield_Cost ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[1] <= 0.05, "*", ""))),
                      sep=" "),paste(ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_High_Yield_Cost ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[2] <= 0.05, "Climate", ""),
                                     ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_High_Yield_Cost ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[2] <= 0.001, "***",
                                            ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_High_Yield_Cost ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[2] <= 0.01, "**",
                                                   ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_High_Yield_Cost ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[2] <= 0.05, "*", "")))), sep="\n"))+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=16),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size=16))

#ggsave("Fig_enEMF_High_Yield_Cost_treatments.pdf", Fig_enEMF_High_Yield_Cost_treatments, scale = 1, width = 5, height = 4, dpi=500, units="in")

Fig_enEMF_Alternative <- ggarrange(Fig_enEMF_Groundwater_treatments, Fig_enEMF_ETS_treatments, Fig_enEMF_Kikstra_treatments, Fig_enEMF_High_Yield_Cost_treatments, ncol = 2, nrow = 2, labels = "auto", font.label = list(size = 24), common.legend = TRUE, legend = "bottom")

ggsave("Figure_S3_enEMF_Alternative.pdf", Fig_enEMF_Alternative, scale = 1, width = 8, height = 8, dpi=500, units="in")
Fig_enEMF_High_Yield_Cost_treatments

Fig_enEMF_Farmers_treatments <- ggplot(aes(x=LUT, y=enEMF_Farmers, color=Climate),data=mf_data_lt)+
  geom_point()+
  scale_colour_manual(values=c("amb" = "#D7551B", "fut" = "#F4B183"))+
  stat_summary(
    geom = "point",
    fun.y = "mean",
    size = 4,
    shape = 17)+
  #ylim(500,3500)+
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar")+ # add errorbar
  ylab("enEMF (farmers)\n(€ / ha / yr)")+
  xlab("Land Use Type")+
  ggtitle(paste(paste(ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Farmers ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[3] <= 0.05, "LUT:Climate", ""),
                      ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Farmers ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[3] <= 0.001, "***",
                             ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Farmers ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[3] <= 0.01, "**",
                                    ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Farmers ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[3] <= 0.05, "*", "")))),
                paste(ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Farmers ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[1] <= 0.05, "LUT", ""),
                      ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Farmers ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[1] <= 0.001, "***",
                             ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Farmers ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[1] <= 0.01, "**",
                                    ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Farmers ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[1] <= 0.05, "*", ""))),
                      sep=" "),paste(ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Farmers ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[2] <= 0.05, "Climate", ""),
                                     ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Farmers ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[2] <= 0.001, "***",
                                            ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Farmers ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[2] <= 0.01, "**",
                                                   ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Farmers ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[2] <= 0.05, "*", "")))), sep="\n"))+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size=16),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size=16))

#ggsave("Fig_enEMF_Farmers_treatments.pdf", Fig_enEMF_Farmers_treatments, scale = 1, width = 5, height = 4, dpi=500, units="in")


Figure_5_enEMF_enEMF_Farmers <- ggarrange(Fig_enEMF_treatments, Fig_enEMF_Farmers_treatments, ncol = 2, nrow = 1, labels = "auto", font.label = list(size = 24), common.legend = TRUE, legend = "bottom")

ggsave("Figure_5_enEMF_enEMF_Farmers.pdf", Figure_5_enEMF_enEMF_Farmers, scale = 1, width = 7.5, height = 4, dpi=500, units="in")
Figure_5_enEMF_enEMF_Farmers

Calculate contribution of individual ecosystem services to enEMF:

new <- data.frame(matrix(nrow=25, ncol=6))
colnames(new) <- c("LUT", "Service", "Value", "Value_Percent", "enEMF", "Land_rent")
new$LUT <- rep(c("EM", "EP", "IM", "OF", "CF"), each=5)
new$LUT <- factor(new$LUT, levels=LUTs)
new$Service <-  rep(c("Food", "Climate_reg", "Water", "Soil_Health", "Biodiversity"))

#Land_rent <- c()
#348 € / ha / yr for grassland, 574 € / ha / yr for farmland in 2019) (MULE 2020
for (i in 1:25){
  new$Value[i] <- ifelse(new$Service[i] == "Food", mean(mf_data_lt$Yield[mf_data_lt$LUT==new$LUT[i]], na.rm=TRUE),
                         ifelse(new$Service[i] == "Climate_reg", mean(mf_data_lt$TOC_Euro[mf_data_lt$LUT==new$LUT[i]], na.rm=TRUE),
                                ifelse(new$Service[i] == "Water", mean(mf_data_lt$Nmin_Surplus_Euro[mf_data_lt$LUT==new$LUT[i]], na.rm=TRUE),
                                       ifelse(new$Service[i] == "Soil_Health", mean(mf_data_lt$IS[mf_data_lt$LUT==new$LUT[i]], na.rm=TRUE),
                                              mean(mf_data_lt$IB[mf_data_lt$LUT==new$LUT[i]], na.rm=TRUE)))))
}




for (i in 1:25){
  new$Value_Percent[i] <- abs(new$Value[i]) / sum(abs(new$Value[new$LUT==new$LUT[i]]))
  new$enEMF[i] <- ifelse(i %in% c(2,3,4,5,7,8,9,10,12,13,14,15,17,18,19,20,22,23,24,25), NA, sum(new$Value[new$LUT==new$LUT[i]]))
  new$enEMF_Farmers[i] <- ifelse(i %in% c(2,3,4,5,7,8,9,10,12,13,14,15,17,18,19,20,22,23,24,25), NA, sum(new$Value[new$LUT==new$LUT[i] & new$Service=="Food" | new$LUT==new$LUT[i] & new$Service=="Soil_Health" | new$LUT==new$LUT[i] & new$Service=="Biodiversity"]))
  new$Land_rent[i] <- ifelse((new$LUT[i] == "EM" | new$LUT[i] == "IM" | new$LUT[i] == "EP"), 348, 574)
  new$Land_rent[i] <- ifelse(i %in% c(2,3,4,5,7,8,9,10,12,13,14,15,17,18,19,20,22,23,24,25), NA, new$Land_rent[i])
}


Figure_4_enEMF_Stacked <- ggplot(aes(x=LUT, y=Value, fill=Service), data=new)+
  geom_bar(position="stack", stat="identity")+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("Food" = "#f9e26e"  , "Climate_reg" = "#bde2ea", "Water" = "#a1ccee", "Soil_Health" = "#d8bb75", "Biodiversity" = "#c3d984"))+
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(Value,0), "\n(", 100*round(Value_Percent,3), "%)")), 
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), size = 2.5)+
  geom_text(aes(label = round(enEMF, 0), angle=45, 
                y = enEMF+100), 
            col="#387880", size=3.8, hjust=0)+
  #geom_text(aes(label = Land_rent, angle=45, y = Land_rent+100),col="red", size=3.8, hjust=0)+ # information regarding land rent not necessary
  xlab("LUT")+
  ylab("Ecosystem service value\n(€ / ha / yr)")+
  geom_errorbar(aes(y=enEMF, ymin=enEMF, ymax=enEMF), size=2.2, color="#387880")+
  geom_text(aes(label = round(enEMF_Farmers, 0), angle=45, 
                y = enEMF_Farmers+100), 
            col="#8a5b41", size=3.8, hjust=0)+
  geom_errorbar(aes(y=enEMF_Farmers, ymin=enEMF_Farmers, ymax=enEMF_Farmers), size=2.2, color="#8a5b41")+
  #geom_errorbar(aes(y=Land_rent, ymin=Land_rent, ymax=Land_rent), size=2.2, color="red") # information regarding land rent not necessary

write.csv(new,"enEMF_Overview.csv")
Figure_4_enEMF_Stacked

# Blue bars indicate enEMF, brown bars indicate enEMF for farmers.
Reg_table_enEMF <- c(round(anova(lmer(enEMF ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"F value"[1], digits=3),
                        round(anova(lmer(enEMF ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[1], digits=3),
                        ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[1] <= 0.001, "***",
                               ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[1] <= 0.01, "**",
                                      ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[1] <= 0.05, "*", ""))),
                        round(anova(lmer(enEMF ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"F value"[2], digits=3),
                        round(anova(lmer(enEMF ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[2],digits = 3),
                        ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[2] <= 0.001, "***",
                               ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[2] <= 0.01, "**",
                                      ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[2] <= 0.05, "*", ""))),
                        round(anova(lmer(enEMF ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"F value"[3],digits = 3),
                        round(anova(lmer(enEMF ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[3],digits=3),
                        ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[3] <= 0.001, "***",
                               ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[3] <= 0.01, "**",
                                      ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[3] <= 0.05, "*", ""))))


Reg_table_enEMF_Farmers <- c(round(anova(lmer(enEMF_Farmers ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"F value"[1], digits=3),
                   round(anova(lmer(enEMF_Farmers ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[1], digits=3),
                   ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Farmers ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[1] <= 0.001, "***",
                          ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Farmers ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[1] <= 0.01, "**",
                                 ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Farmers ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[1] <= 0.05, "*", ""))),
                   round(anova(lmer(enEMF_Farmers ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"F value"[2], digits=3),
                   round(anova(lmer(enEMF_Farmers ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[2],digits = 3),
                   ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Farmers ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[2] <= 0.001, "***",
                          ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Farmers ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[2] <= 0.01, "**",
                                 ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Farmers ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[2] <= 0.05, "*", ""))),
                   round(anova(lmer(enEMF_Farmers ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"F value"[3],digits = 3),
                   round(anova(lmer(enEMF_Farmers ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[3],digits=3),
                   ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Farmers ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[3] <= 0.001, "***",
                          ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Farmers ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[3] <= 0.01, "**",
                                 ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Farmers ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[3] <= 0.05, "*", ""))))

Reg_table_enEMF_enEMF_Farmers <- data.frame(matrix(nrow=2, ncol=10))
colnames(Reg_table_enEMF_enEMF_Farmers) <- c("Scenario", "LUT F value", "LUT p value", "LUT sig", "Climate F value", "Climate p value", "Climate sig", "LUT:Climate F value", "LUT:Climate p value", "LUT:Climate sig")
Reg_table_enEMF_enEMF_Farmers[1,2:10] <- Reg_table_enEMF
Reg_table_enEMF_enEMF_Farmers[2,2:10] <- Reg_table_enEMF_Farmers
Reg_table_enEMF_enEMF_Farmers$Scenario <- c("enEMF", "enEMF_Farmers")

write.csv(Reg_table_enEMF_enEMF_Farmers, "Table_S6_Regression_table_enEMF_enEMF_Farmers.csv")
Reg_table_enEMF_enEMF_Farmers
##        Scenario LUT F value LUT p value LUT sig Climate F value Climate p value
## 1         enEMF      14.937           0     ***               0           0.997
## 2 enEMF_Farmers     153.029           0     ***          34.559               0
##   Climate sig LUT:Climate F value LUT:Climate p value LUT:Climate sig
## 1                           0.564               0.691                
## 2         ***               0.329               0.856

Linear mixed-effects regression tables for annex:

# alternative CO2 price (ETS)
Reg_table_enEMF_ETS <- c(round(anova(lmer(enEMF_ETS ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"F value"[1], digits=3),
                   round(anova(lmer(enEMF_ETS ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[1], digits=3),
                   ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_ETS ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[1] <= 0.001, "***",
                          ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_ETS ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[1] <= 0.01, "**",
                                 ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_ETS ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[1] <= 0.05, "*", ""))),
                   round(anova(lmer(enEMF_ETS ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"F value"[2], digits=3),
                   round(anova(lmer(enEMF_ETS ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[2],digits = 3),
                   ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_ETS ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[2] <= 0.001, "***",
                          ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_ETS ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[2] <= 0.01, "**",
                                 ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_ETS ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[2] <= 0.05, "*", ""))),
                   round(anova(lmer(enEMF_ETS ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"F value"[3],digits = 3),
                   round(anova(lmer(enEMF_ETS ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[3],digits=3),
                   ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_ETS ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[3] <= 0.001, "***",
                          ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_ETS ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[3] <= 0.01, "**",
                                 ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_ETS ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[3] <= 0.05, "*", ""))))




# alternative nitrogen leaching price (1.9 €/t)

Reg_table_enEMF_Groundwater <- c(round(anova(lmer(enEMF_Groundwater ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"F value"[1], digits=3),
                   round(anova(lmer(enEMF_Groundwater ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[1], digits=3),
                   ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Groundwater ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[1] <= 0.001, "***",
                          ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Groundwater ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[1] <= 0.01, "**",
                                 ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Groundwater ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[1] <= 0.05, "*", ""))),
                   round(anova(lmer(enEMF_Groundwater ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"F value"[2], digits=3),
                   round(anova(lmer(enEMF_Groundwater ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[2],digits = 3),
                   ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Groundwater ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[2] <= 0.001, "***",
                          ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Groundwater ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[2] <= 0.01, "**",
                                 ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Groundwater ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[2] <= 0.05, "*", ""))),
                   round(anova(lmer(enEMF_Groundwater ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"F value"[3],digits = 3),
                   round(anova(lmer(enEMF_Groundwater ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[3],digits=3),
                   ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Groundwater ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[3] <= 0.001, "***",
                          ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Groundwater ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[3] <= 0.01, "**",
                                 ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Groundwater ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[3] <= 0.05, "*", ""))))


# alternative co2 price (Kikstra)

Reg_table_enEMF_Kikstra <- c(round(anova(lmer(enEMF_Kikstra ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"F value"[1], digits=3),
                   round(anova(lmer(enEMF_Kikstra ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[1], digits=3),
                   ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Kikstra ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[1] <= 0.001, "***",
                          ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Kikstra ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[1] <= 0.01, "**",
                                 ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Kikstra ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[1] <= 0.05, "*", ""))),
                   round(anova(lmer(enEMF_Kikstra ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"F value"[2], digits=3),
                   round(anova(lmer(enEMF_Kikstra ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[2],digits = 3),
                   ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Kikstra ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[2] <= 0.001, "***",
                          ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Kikstra ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[2] <= 0.01, "**",
                                 ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Kikstra ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[2] <= 0.05, "*", ""))),
                   round(anova(lmer(enEMF_Kikstra ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"F value"[3],digits = 3),
                   round(anova(lmer(enEMF_Kikstra ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[3],digits=3),
                   ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Kikstra ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[3] <= 0.001, "***",
                          ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Kikstra ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[3] <= 0.01, "**",
                                 ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_Kikstra ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[3] <= 0.05, "*", ""))))

# higher yield prices (40%)


Reg_table_enEMF_High_Yield_Cost <- c(round(anova(lmer(enEMF_High_Yield_Cost ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"F value"[1], digits=3),
                   round(anova(lmer(enEMF_High_Yield_Cost ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[1], digits=3),
                   ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_High_Yield_Cost ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[1] <= 0.001, "***",
                          ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_High_Yield_Cost ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[1] <= 0.01, "**",
                                 ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_High_Yield_Cost ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[1] <= 0.05, "*", ""))),
                   round(anova(lmer(enEMF_High_Yield_Cost ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"F value"[2], digits=3),
                   round(anova(lmer(enEMF_High_Yield_Cost ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[2],digits = 3),
                   ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_High_Yield_Cost ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[2] <= 0.001, "***",
                          ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_High_Yield_Cost ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[2] <= 0.01, "**",
                                 ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_High_Yield_Cost ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[2] <= 0.05, "*", ""))),
                   round(anova(lmer(enEMF_High_Yield_Cost ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"F value"[3],digits = 3),
                   round(anova(lmer(enEMF_High_Yield_Cost ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[3],digits=3),
                   ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_High_Yield_Cost ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[3] <= 0.001, "***",
                          ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_High_Yield_Cost ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[3] <= 0.01, "**",
                                 ifelse(anova(lmer(enEMF_High_Yield_Cost ~ LUT * Climate + (1 | Mainplot), data = mf_data_lt))$"Pr(>F)"[3] <= 0.05, "*", ""))))

Regression_table_enEMF_alternative_price_Scenarios <- data.frame(matrix(nrow=1, ncol=10))
colnames(Regression_table_enEMF_alternative_price_Scenarios) <- c("Scenario", "LUT F value", "LUT p value", "LUT sig", "Climate F value", "Climate p value", "Climate sig", "LUT:Climate F value", "LUT:Climate p value", "LUT:Climate sig")
Regression_table_enEMF_alternative_price_Scenarios[1,2:10] <- Reg_table_enEMF_ETS
Regression_table_enEMF_alternative_price_Scenarios[2,2:10] <- Reg_table_enEMF_Groundwater
Regression_table_enEMF_alternative_price_Scenarios[3,2:10] <- Reg_table_enEMF_Kikstra
Regression_table_enEMF_alternative_price_Scenarios[4,2:10] <- Reg_table_enEMF_High_Yield_Cost
Regression_table_enEMF_alternative_price_Scenarios$Scenario <- c("enEMF_ETC", "enEMF_Groundwater", "enEMF_Kikstra", "enEMF_High_Yield_Cost")


write.csv(Regression_table_enEMF_alternative_price_Scenarios, "Table_S9_Regression_table_enEMF_alternative_price_Scenarios.csv")
Regression_table_enEMF_alternative_price_Scenarios
##                Scenario LUT F value LUT p value LUT sig Climate F value
## 1             enEMF_ETC      37.589           0     ***           1.548
## 2     enEMF_Groundwater       6.385       0.001     ***           0.083
## 3         enEMF_Kikstra      12.376           0     ***           0.152
## 4 enEMF_High_Yield_Cost      12.348           0     ***           0.052
##   Climate p value Climate sig LUT:Climate F value LUT:Climate p value
## 1           0.248                           0.545               0.704
## 2            0.78                           0.619               0.652
## 3           0.707                           0.574               0.684
## 4           0.825                           0.615               0.655
##   LUT:Climate sig
## 1                
## 2                
## 3                
## 4
ggsave("Figure_4_enEMF_Stacked.pdf", Figure_4_enEMF_Stacked, scale = 1, width = 8.5, height = 6, dpi=500, units="in")

Red values represent the level of total enEMF provision (sum of all single ecosystem service values - in case of the presence of dis-service (negative monetary value) the total enEMF can be lower than the actual stacked bars appear)

Conduct a sensitivity analysis for the dependency of the insurance value of soil health / biodiversity on the value for risk aversion r: The insurance value IV of soil health SH at the level i SH(i) was calculated as the RP at SH(0) and M(i) minus the RP at SH(i) and M(i). For biodiversity, vice versa. IV(SH[i]) <- RP(SH=0, M[i]) - RP(SH[i], M[i]) AND IV(M[i]) <- RP(SH[i], M=0) - RP(SH[i], M[i])

sensitivity_to_r <- data.frame(matrix(nrow=16, ncol=3))
colnames(sensitivity_to_r) <- c("r", "mean_IB", "mean_IS")
sensitivity_to_r$r <- seq(0,1.5,by=0.1)

for (i in 1:16){
  for (j in 1:50){
    mf_data_lt$RP[j] <- mf_data_lt$Yield[j] - mf_data_lt$Yield[j] * (((1 + (cv(mf_data_big$Yield[mf_data_big$Plot==mf_data_lt$Plot[j]])))^2)^(-(sensitivity_to_r$r[i])/2))
  }
  screening <-lm(RP ~ Soil_Health+Multidiv, data = mf_data_lt)
  centcomp <- lm(RP ~ Soil_Health*Multidiv + I(Soil_Health^2) + I(Multidiv^2), data = mf_data_lt)
  centcomp_results = data.frame(mf_data_lt$RP, centcomp$fitted.values, mf_data_lt$RP - centcomp$fitted.values)
  colnames(centcomp_results) = c("expt RP", "pred RP", "residual error")
  x1_axis <- seq(0.1,0.7,0.012) # based on min and max values of soil health
  x2_axis <- seq(0.4,0.9,0.01) # based on min and max values of biodiversity
  response = function(x,y){coef(centcomp)[1] + coef(centcomp)[2]*x + coef(centcomp)[3]*y + coef(centcomp)[4]*x^2 + coef(centcomp)[5]*y^2 + coef(centcomp)[6]*x*y}
  for (j in 1:50){
    mf_data_lt$IB[j] <- (coef(centcomp)[1] + coef(centcomp)[2]*mf_data_lt$Soil_Health[j] + coef(centcomp)[3]*0 + coef(centcomp)[4]*mf_data_lt$Soil_Health[j]^2 + coef(centcomp)[5]*0^2 + coef(centcomp)[6]*mf_data_lt$Soil_Health[j]*0) - (coef(centcomp)[1] + coef(centcomp)[2]*mf_data_lt$Soil_Health[j] + coef(centcomp)[3]*mf_data_lt$Multidiv[j] + coef(centcomp)[4]*mf_data_lt$Soil_Health[j]^2 + coef(centcomp)[5]*mf_data_lt$Multidiv[j]^2 + coef(centcomp)[6]*mf_data_lt$Soil_Health[j]*mf_data_lt$Multidiv[j])
    mf_data_lt$IS[j] <- (coef(centcomp)[1] + coef(centcomp)[2]*0 + coef(centcomp)[3]*mf_data_lt$Multidiv[j] + coef(centcomp)[4]*0^2 + coef(centcomp)[5]*mf_data_lt$Multidiv[j]^2 + coef(centcomp)[6]*0*mf_data_lt$Multidiv[j]) - (coef(centcomp)[1] + coef(centcomp)[2]*mf_data_lt$Soil_Health[j] + coef(centcomp)[3]*mf_data_lt$Multidiv[j] + coef(centcomp)[4]*mf_data_lt$Soil_Health[j]^2 + coef(centcomp)[5]*mf_data_lt$Multidiv[j]^2 + coef(centcomp)[6]*mf_data_lt$Soil_Health[j]*mf_data_lt$Multidiv[j])
  }
  sensitivity_to_r$mean_IB[i] <- mean(mf_data_lt$IB)
  sensitivity_to_r$mean_IS[i] <- mean(mf_data_lt$IS)
}

sensitivity_to_r.2 <- data.frame(matrix(nrow=nrow(sensitivity_to_r)*2, ncol=3))
colnames(sensitivity_to_r.2) <- c("r", "Service_Insurance", "Mean_Insurance_Value")
sensitivity_to_r.2$r <- sensitivity_to_r$r
sensitivity_to_r.2$Service_Insurance <- rep(c("Multidiversity", "Soil_Health"), each=nrow(sensitivity_to_r))

sensitivity_to_r.2$Mean_Insurance_Value[sensitivity_to_r.2$Service_Insurance=="Multidiversity"] <- sensitivity_to_r$mean_IB

sensitivity_to_r.2$Mean_Insurance_Value[sensitivity_to_r.2$Service_Insurance=="Soil_Health"] <- sensitivity_to_r$mean_IS

Insurance_Sensitivity <- ggplot(sensitivity_to_r.2, aes(x=r, y=Mean_Insurance_Value, color=Service_Insurance))+
  geom_smooth(span=0.5)+
  ylab("Insurance value (€ / ha / yr)\n(mean of all plots)")+
  xlab("Risk aversion r")+
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0.28, linetype="solid", color = "black", size=0.5)

ggsave("Figure_S5_Insurance_Sensitivity.pdf", Insurance_Sensitivity, scale = 1, width = 7, height = 4, dpi=500, units="in")
Insurance_Sensitivity

#write.csv(mf_data_lt, "Complete_dataset.csv")

Create correlation matrix with p values

cor_variables <- c("Yield", "TOC", "Nmin_Surplus", "Mic_Bio", "CEL", "NAG", "PHO", "Decomp_Below",
                   "Decomp_Above_Fine", "Decomp_Above_Coarse", "Biodiv_Meso", "Biodiv_Macro",
                   "Biodiv_Nematode", "Percentage_FlowCov", "Multidiv", "Soil_Health", "egEMF_Farmers", "egEMF_Locals", "egEMF_Env", "egEMF_Tourism","enEMF", "enEMF_Farmers", "egEMF_Func", "egEMF_Serv")



cor_matrix <- matrix(NA, ncol = length(cor_variables), nrow = length(cor_variables))
p_values <- matrix(NA, ncol = length(cor_variables), nrow = length(cor_variables))

for (i in 1:length(cor_variables)) {
  for (j in 1:length(cor_variables)) {
    result <- cor.test(mf_data_lt[[cor_variables[i]]], mf_data_lt[[cor_variables[j]]])
    cor_matrix[i, j] <- result$estimate
    p_values[i, j] <- result$p.value
  }
}

colnames(cor_matrix) <- cor_variables
rownames(cor_matrix) <- cor_variables

colnames(p_values) <- cor_variables
rownames(p_values) <- cor_variables

p_values

##                        egEMF_Env egEMF_Tourism        enEMF enEMF_Farmers
## Yield               6.480673e-01  2.281325e-02 1.242360e-02  7.157756e-33
## TOC                 3.668877e-01  4.108573e-01 1.479399e-04  1.353983e-07
## Nmin_Surplus        3.653488e-09  1.149142e-08 3.547125e-06  7.260274e-01
